content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Mon, 16 Feb 2026 12:54:40 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 245 | Critical: 74 | High: 28 | Medium: 18 | Low: 125

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] 15-day-old baby loses father in Israeli strike on Gaza (Al Jazeera)
  [AFRICA] Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport (BBC Africa)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Rubio meets Orbán in Budapest as US and Hungary are to sign a civilian nuclear pact (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Israeli producer , Dana Eden , of spy thriller  Tehran  found dead in Athens hotel : cops (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of a second round of US talks (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (58 events, 27 critical, 9 high):
    - 15-day-old baby loses father in Israeli strike on Gaza
    - Rubio meets Orbán in Budapest as US and Hungary are to sign a civilian nuclear pact
    - Israeli producer , Dana Eden , of spy thriller  Tehran  found dead in Athens hotel : cops
  Ukraine/Russia (12 events, 5 critical, 3 high):
    - North Korea opens a housing district for families of its soldiers killed in Russia - Ukraine war
    - Kim Jong Un moves families of Ukraine war dead into new housing complex
    - Kim Jong-un unveils housing for families of North Koreans killed in Ukraine war
  Europe (43 events, 14 critical, 3 high):
    - How an undercover cop foiled an IS plot to massacre Britain’s Jews – podcast
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
  Indo-Pacific (40 events, 5 critical, 3 high):
    - North Korea opens new housing area for families of soldiers killed overseas - Dominican Republic Post – Caribbean News , Business , Travel & Culture
    - Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
  United States (5 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
  Global (66 events, 11 critical, 7 high):
    - ‘People want to help’: Canadians rally round Tumbler Ridge after school shooting
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - New information warfare squadrons will increase readiness and lethality at sea: Officer

Sources: Al Jazeera, BBC Africa, GDELT, Middle East Eye, BBC Asia, NK News, BBC Middle East, The Guardian, NYT World, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat, BBC World
